filtered_articles.title: Crimson Desert Hits New Huge Sales Milestone Less Than 3 Months After Launch
filtered_articles.description: Crimson Desert has now sold over 6 million copies worldwide, Pearl Abyss has announced. The impressive milestone was achieved less than three months after the game went on sale.
